Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: stencil prints [300435283], prints by process: transfer method [300178544], prints by process or technique [300041337], prints (visual works) [300041273], visual works by material or technique [300191091], visual works (works) [300191086], Visual Works (hierarchy name) [300179869], Visual and Verbal Communication (hierarchy name) [300264552], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Prints made by exclusively using the process of screen printing, whether originated by hand or photographically.
Estampas realizadas mediante el proceso serigráfico.

Prenten die alleen met behulp van het zeefdrukprocedé zijn gemaakt, handmatig of fotografisch. Het drukken vindt plaats door inkt of verf door een zeef te duwen waarin een ontwerp is aangebracht door bepaalde gedeelten af te sluiten.
以網印程序製成的版畫，有些為手工網印，有些為攝影網印。
Druck, der ausschließlich im Siebdruckverfahren hergestellt wurde, unabhängig davon, ob manuell oder fotografisch entstanden.

Source.Source_ID: 2000008421/Chamberlain, Thames and Hudson Manual of Etching (1978)
2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)
2000033721/Museum Prototype Project, Medium of Objects Frequency Report (1985)
2000026701/Mayer, Dictionary of Art Terms and Techniques (1969)

Term_Source.Page: 145, 1960s "no longer was the fancy word serigraph needed - artists were producing screen prints."

Source.Source_ID: 2000017031/Zinkham and Parker, Descriptive Terms for Graphic Materials (1986)
